title: Enchanted Golden Apple Recipe
description: Adds a recipe for crafting the enchanted golden apple and an achievement for eating one.
body:
Adds the ability to craft a enchanted golden apple using 8 gold blocks and a regular apple. There is also an advancement unlockable through eating one.

![Crafting the enchanted golden apple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BJeyaWXi/images/ceb556134844d850224839234afbd336333321bd.png)

_This may be slightly unbalanced._
